SessionSummary.description: Compact session row returned by `sessions.list`. Larger / costlier fields (transcript path, spawn args) live on the create/attach results instead and are only returned when the client actually wants them.

title.description: User-editable title; `None` until the user names the session.

origin.description: `'user'` for a human-started session, `'cron:<cron_id>'` for a scheduled run, `'import'` for one discovered on disk.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp the session row was created.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the last state change (output, write, exit, …).

worktree_path.description: Worktree path if any; `None` for sessions sharing the project root.

oneOf.description: Soft-deleted by the user via `sessions.archive`. The row stays in SQLite (and may be restored) but is hidden from the default list.
